name: 6 Mile GreenGuyz
description: The 6 Mile GreenGuyz, also known as ShotGun Crips (SGC), are a predominantly African American, Crip-affiliated street gang historically active on Detroit's east side. They operate as a localized Detroit set within the wider ShotGun Crips framework and are part of a Gangster Crips (3X / Movin' Gang)–
